Title: Sexual Chronicles of a French Family
Actors: Mathias Melloul, Valérie Maës, Stephan Hersoen
Plot: The school catches 18-year-old Romain video taping himself masturbating in class and suspends him. Though the school drops the matter after learning it's only one incident in a game in which all students participate, Romain remains distressed. He's still a virgin and the only member of his family not engaged in sexual activity.
